title: Demo — Skull & Bone Basics
description: A small sample quiz showing both question types: pin identification on the anterior skull plus a few multiple-choice questions.

questions.prompt: Which cell type is responsible for breaking down bone matrix during remodeling?
questions.explanation: Osteoclasts resorb bone; osteoblasts build new matrix, and osteocytes are mature maintainers trapped in lacunae.

questions.prompt: The structural unit of compact bone, consisting of concentric lamellae around a central canal, is the:
questions.explanation: The osteon (Haversian system) is compact bone's repeating unit; trabeculae are the struts of spongy bone.

questions.prompt: Which suture joins the two parietal bones at the midline?
questions.explanation: The sagittal suture runs between the parietals; the coronal joins frontal to parietals, the lambdoid joins parietals to occipital.

questions.prompt: The coronal suture joins the frontal bone to which bones?
questions.explanation: The coronal suture runs across the crown between the frontal bone and the two parietals.
